g.text: Interactive workshop for data, LLMs, CV, RAG, and fine-tuning
Search README topics, concepts, or section highlights
LLMs have a knowledge cutoff and can't access your private data.
solves this by adding a retrieval step before generation: search a
knowledge base for relevant documents, inject them into the prompt, and let the
model answer grounded in real sources.
Command: No direct launcher for this resource.
